title: Den glade enke i Trangvik
actors: Thorleif Klausen, Harald Steen, Sigrun Svenningsen
plot: The whole town of Trangvik are up-roared by a young woman dressed improperly in a bathing suit, and many gather to make sure the town's morale is restored. But miss Helene Dyring isn't willing to give up her bathing holiday.
